mapper.select:
select b.balance_id, b.warehouse_id, b.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_type, w.provider_name, b.sku_id, b.sku_code, b.sku_name, b.available_qty, b.locked_qty, b.inbound_qty, b.defective_qty, b.safety_qty, b.cost_price, b.external_available_qty, b.external_locked_qty, b.sync_diff_qty, b.sync_status, b.last_sync_time, b.create_time, b.update_time from erp_inventory_balance b inner join erp_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = b.warehouse_id
order by case when ifnull(b.sync_diff_qty, 0) != 0 then 0 else 1 end, case when b.available_qty <= b.safety_qty then 0 else 1 end, b.balance_id desc

select count(distinct b.warehouse_id) as warehouseCount, count(*) as skuCount, ifnull(sum(case when w.warehouse_type in ('physical', 'self', 'return') then b.available_qty else 0 end), 0) as physicalAvailableQty, ifnull(sum(case when w.warehouse_type in ('cloud', 'third_party') then b.available_qty else 0 end), 0) as cloudLedgerAvailableQty, ifnull(sum(case when w.warehouse_type in ('cloud', 'third_party') then ifnull(b.external_available_qty, 0) else 0 end), 0) as cloudExternalAvailableQty, ifnull(sum(b.locked_qty), 0) as lockedQty, ifnull(sum(b.inbound_qty), 0) as inboundQty, ifnull(sum(b.defective_qty), 0) as defectiveQty, sum(case when b.available_qty <= b.safety_qty then 1 else 0 end) as lowStockSkuCount, sum(case when w.warehouse_type in ('cloud', 'third_party') and ifnull(b.sync_diff_qty, 0) != 0 then 1 else 0 end) as cloudDiffSkuCount, ifnull(sum(b.available_qty * b.cost_price), 0) as inventoryAmount from erp_inventory_balance b inner join erp_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = b.warehouse_id

select sku_code from erp_product_sku where sku_code in
#{skuCode}
mapper.insert: insert into erp_inventory_balance( warehouse_id, warehouse_name, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, available_qty, locked_qty, inbound_qty, defective_qty, safety_qty, cost_price, external_available_qty, external_locked_qty, sync_diff_qty, sync_status, last_sync_time, create_time, update_time ) select #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, s.sku_id, s.sku_code, s.sku_name, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, ifnull(s.cost_price, 0), #{item.availableQty}, ifnull(#{item.lockedQty}, 0), #{item.availableQty}, if(#{item.availableQty} = 0, 'matched', 'difference'), sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from erp_product_sku s where s.sku_code = #{item.skuCode} limit 1 on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), sku_code = values(sku_code), sku_name = values(sku_name), external_available_qty = values(external_available_qty), external_locked_qty = values(external_locked_qty), sync_diff_qty = values(external_available_qty) - available_qty, sync_status = if(values(external_available_qty) = available_qty, 'matched', 'difference'), last_sync_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select count(*) from erp_inventory_balance where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and ifnull(sync_diff_qty, 0) != 0
mapper.insert: insert into erp_warehouse_sync_log( sync_batch_no, warehouse_id, source_type, sync_status, total_sku_count, matched_sku_count, unmatched_sku_count, difference_sku_count, started_time, finished_time, message, create_by, create_time ) values( #{syncBatchNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{sourceType}, #{syncStatus}, #{totalSkuCount}, #{matchedSkuCount}, #{unmatchedSkuCount}, #{differenceSkuCount}, #{startedTime}, sysdate(), #{message}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select sync_log_id as syncLogId, sync_batch_no as syncBatchNo, warehouse_id as warehouseId, source_type as sourceType, sync_status as syncStatus, total_sku_count as totalSkuCount, matched_sku_count as matchedSkuCount, unmatched_sku_count as unmatchedSkuCount, difference_sku_count as differenceSkuCount, started_time as startedTime, finished_time as finishedTime, message, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime from erp_warehouse_sync_log where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} order by sync_log_id desc limit 30
